title: Tunisia Individual Income Tax Declaration — IRPP (التصريح بالضريبة على دخل الأشخاص الطبيعيين)
description: The Ministry of Economy and Finance's Direction Générale des Impôts (DGI)'s annual "Déclaration de l'Impôt sur le Revenu des Personnes Physiques" (IRPP) — Tunisia's individual income tax return, covering all nine of the tax code's own income categories (industrial/commercial profits, non-commercial professional profits, agricultural/fishing profits, real estate income, wages and pensions, securities and movable-capital income, other income, exempt income, and non-taxable income) plus common deductions and the progressive tax computation. Fetched directly and unauthenticated as a static PDF from the Ministry of Finance's own site, finances.gov.tn. Opens Tunisia's Taxes vertical (GOV-4666, "GovSchema Standard Research"), picked up from GOV-4638's own banked candidate. This schema does not submit the declaration itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Tunisia, its Ministry of Economy and Finance, or the Direction Générale des Impôts.

authority.name: Direction Générale des Impôts (Ministère des Finances)

source.documentRef: التصريح بالضريبة على دخل الأشخاص الطبيعيين — Déclaration de l'Impôt sur le Revenu des Personnes Physiques (IRPP)

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, the fourth-failure-mode Arabic-glyph-scramble extraction (node-canvas render used as the primary reading method, matching tn/dgi/declaration-of-existence@1.0.0's own precedent), every requiredWhen judgment call, and the disclosed scope boundary — this 13-page specimen's per-category detailed build-up schedules (pages 2-5, 7, 9-13) are excluded from this v1.0.0 and banked as open backlog for a future minor version, matching this registry's established main-form-now/companion-schedules-later precedent (Kazakhstan's 220.00/250.00 series).

fields.description: This registry's own bounded-slot modelling of the form's own four identically-printed child-status boxes (الأول/الثاني/الثالث/الرابع) — matching this registry's established bounded-slot precedent for forms that print a fixed small number of repeated sub-blocks with no dynamic add-row mechanism. See VERIFICATION.md.

See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.description: The bracket table itself (0%/15%/20%/25%/30%/35% against fixed dinar thresholds) is a printed reference schedule, not filer-supplied data — only the resulting total is modelled, per this registry's established computed-line exclusion convention. See VERIFICATION.md.

documents.label: Balance sheet (الموازنة)
documents.sourceRef: Page 10 — "الوثائق المصاحبة للتصريح" checklist, "القوائم المالية: الموازنة"

documents.sourceRef: Page 10 — same checklist, "الإيضاحات حول القوائم المالية"

documents.label: Tax-result reconciliation schedule, from the accounting result (جدول احتساب النتيجة الجبائية انطلاقا من النتيجة المحاسبية)
Detailed depreciation schedule (قائمة مفصلة في الاستهلاكات)
Detailed schedule of provisions for doubtful/uncollectible debts (قائمة مفصلة في المدخرات المكوّنة بعنوان الديون غير ثابتة الاستخلاص)
Detailed schedule of donations and grants given (قائمة مفصلة في الهبات والإعانات)
Supporting certificates for withholding-tax and advance-payment credits (الشهادات المبررة للخصم من المورد والتسبقات)
Employer certificate confirming minimum-wage-earner status (شهادة من المؤجر تبين وضعية الأجير إذا كان من أصحاب الأجر الأدنى المضمون)
Signed declaration attesting to the accuracy of the data
documents.statement: إني الممضي أسفله أشهد بصحة البيانات التي تتضمنها هذا التصريح.
documents.sourceRef: Page 8 — attestation statement, followed by "في ........." (place/date) and "الإمضاء" (signature)
